transactions.desc: Martinez was optioned to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.
Brogdon cleared waivers Thursday and accepted his outright to Triple-A Columbus, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Nationals optioned Kent to Triple-A Rochester on Thursday.
The Seattle Mariners traded LHP José Suarez to the Athletics.
The Athletics designated Perez for assignment Thursday.
The Athletics acquired Suarez from the Mariners on Thursday in exchange for cash considerations.
The Mariners optioned Simpson to Triple-A Tacoma on Thursday.
The Mariners activated Ferrer from the paternity leave list Thursday.
Seattle recalled Pereda from Triple-A Tacoma on Thursday.
The Rockies recalled Gordon from Triple-A Albuquerque on Thursday, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Marlins optioned Ekness to Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Marlins recalled Garrett from Triple-A Jacksonville on Thursday.
The Twins recalled Kreidler from Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday, Betsy Helfand of the St. Paul Pioneer Press reports.
The Twins recalled Matthews from Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday, Betsy Helfand of the St. Paul Pioneer Press reports.
The Twins optioned Adams to Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday, Betsy Helfand of the St. Paul Pioneer Press reports.
The Twins optioned Wallner to Triple-A St. Paul on Thursday, Betsy Helfand of the St. Paul Pioneer Press reports.
Paddack signed a one-year deal with the Reds on Wednesday and is slated to start Saturday's game against the Guardians in Cleveland, C. Trent Rosecrans of The Athletic reports.
The Athletics recalled Barnett from Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
The Marlins reinstated Fairbanks (hand) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday.
The Mets recalled Senger from Triple-A Syracuse on Wednesday.
The Reds designated HIggins for assignment Wednesday.
Paddack signed a major-league contract with the Reds on Wednesday.
The Mariners designated Suarez for assignment Wednesday.
Baltimore recalled Handley from Triple-A Norfolk on Wednesday.
The Mariners reinstated Miller (oblique) from the 15-day injured list ahead of his scheduled start Wednesday in Houston.
The Guardians optioned Aleman to Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
Heuer was recalled from Triple-A Columbus on Wednesday.
The Angels activated Johnson (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list Wednesday, Jeff Fletcher of The Orange County Register reports.
The Pirates recalled Rodriguez from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday, Danny Demilio of PittsburghBaseballNow.com reports.
The Pirates recalled Bidois from Triple-A Indianapolis on Tuesday.
